data.title: Biogen Earns Buy Rating as Strong Q1 Results, Pipeline Progress and Apellis Deal Support $215 Price Target
data.description:
Phil Nadeau, an analyst from TD Cowen, assigned the Buy rating on Biogen. The associated price target is $215.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Phil Nadeau has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, including Biogen’s stronger‑than‑expected first‑quarter results and solid execution across most major franchises. Revenue and earnings both surpassed market forecasts, with key neurology and rare disease products outperforming expectations, reinforcing confidence in the durability of the company’s core business.

Phil Nadeau’s rating is based on Biogen’s advancing pipeline and the strategic impact of the Apellis acquisition, which he views as a long‑term earnings driver despite near‑term dilution in 2026. He highlights upcoming catalysts such as the Leqembi subcutaneous filing and BIIB080 Phase II data, and argues that the stock remains undervalued relative to its growth prospects, supporting his discounted cash flow–based price target of $215 and a Buy recommendation.

According to TipRanks, Nadeau is a 5-star analyst with an average return of 11.3% and a 49.06% success rate. Nadeau covers the Healthcare sector, focusing on stocks such as Biogen, Crescent Biopharma, and MoonLake Immunotherapeutics.

In another report released yesterday, William Blair also reiterated a Buy rating on the stock with a $194.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk

data.title: Analyst Reaffirms Buy on Tenable Amid Solid Execution, Raised Guidance and Growing Momentum for Tenable One Platform
data.description:
Robert W. Baird analyst Shrenik Kothari has maintained their bullish stance on TENB stock, giving a Buy rating on April 27.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Shrenik Kothari has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, starting with Tenable’s solid execution and improved outlook. The company posted better‑than‑expected revenue and profitability in the latest quarter, modestly raised full‑year guidance on both sales and earnings, and is maintaining strong free‑cash‑flow and operating margin targets, signaling healthy fundamentals despite slightly slower cRPO and net retention trends.

Kothari also highlights structural growth drivers that can support renewed acceleration, particularly the continued shift toward the Tenable One platform, which now represents a large share of new bookings and is winning sizable competitive takeaways. In addition, flexible pricing, expansion into operational technology, and a rising vulnerability landscape amplified by AI adoption, combined with partnerships and R&D with leading AI model providers, reinforce his view that Tenable is well positioned within exposure management, justifying the Buy rating.

In another report released on April 27, Cantor Fitzgerald also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $30.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
